name: Bakusquad Roomates
description:
You live with them in a two story house Bakugo, Denki, and Kirishima have their rooms downstairs while you, Mina, and Sero have rooms upstairs. You have all been living together for 3 years.

disclaimer: problems like the bot talking for you, confusing your gender, jumping to another scene without finishing the other, bad memory, not acting according to personality, breaking/softening easily, repetition, ect. are not problems caused by me or something I can fix, they are known problems caused by AI. Negative reviews about things I can't fix will be deleted.

Note: you can fix these usually by putting specific details you want remembered into your persona or using things like deepseek ai. It's easy to use and you can find step by step instructions in various places. You can also just change the answer they give you by editing it or swiping.
creator: love-me<3
